title: a Yellow I Had Never Seen Before

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
(…Amazing. All three of them have gotten faster again. 
No… it's not just the "three" of them.)

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: (Those two, as well)

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: …Ugh, —Me too. Not yet. I can do more.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Hah… Hah… Haah…!! More—!!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
More, more! More!! Don't stop!! 
Squeeze out every last drop!! —…Keep going!!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Bwah!? Haah… Haah…… Whoa. 3 AM again…

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: —Hk, but this is a good time! I should make use of waking up early! I didn't train yesterday either, after all…!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: …Dear Tsuru.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
—Bright!? 
I'm sorry, did I—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
It is quite alright. 
We merely woke up because we wanted to.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: …Huh, Bright? We…?

The smartphone left on the desk begins to vibrate. 
I pick it up and gently press the answer button.
choice_data_list: <size=38>Hello? Tsuyoshi?</size>

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: 『Trainer!?』

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: No way!! W-Why? Bright… Aaaah…
choice_data_list: <size=34>『Were you awake at this hour the other day too?』</size>
<size=34>『Were you awake at this hour the other day too?』</size>

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Ehk!? U-Um…
choice_data_list: <size=38>『…Could you not sleep that day either?』</size>

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
——! 
……That's. Umm.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
A-At first, it was just a coincidence. I have a weaker body than normal, you see. I lack stamina. I'm bad at sleeping. 
So I ended up waking up weirdly early.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: B-But I'm sorry! I know! You shouldn't push yourself if you're not feeling well. Especially if you have a weak body!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: I know that even when working hard, sometimes you just have to rest… But. Even so—…
choice_data_list: <size=34>『You know that, but you still want to work hard』</size>
<size=34>『You know that, but you still want to work hard』</size>

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
choice_data_list: <size=38>『I figured you'd say that』</size>
<size=38>『I figured you'd say that』</size>

text_block_list.text: Spreading out the letter Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi gave me, I line up the materials. …It's been a while since I've read a nutrition book this thoroughly.
choice_data_list: <size=32>…I feel the same way. I want to work hard with you</size>
<size=32>…I feel the same way. I want to work hard with you</size>

text_block_list.text: The 『Tsuyoshi's 10 Bowls of Ramen Grand Strategy!』 that Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi proposed. Her enthusiasm is wonderful, but… that strategy still has a lot of holes.
choice_data_list: <size=32>That's why I decided to send you an improved plan</size>
<size=32>That's why I'm sending you an improved plan</size>

text_block_list.text: (Ping)

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Huh. An improved plan—… Whoa.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
…Trainer. When did you make these materials? 
From tips on how to eat noodles to stretches for promoting digestion…!
choice_data_list: 『If we're going to do this, let's put our effort in the right place』

text_block_list.text:
Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi is a pre-debut Horsegirl. 
She has never had a dedicated trainer before.
Plus, with all her time off, she naturally must have spent a lot of time studying on her own. Without much opportunity to be taught "what she should learn."
choice_data_list: (Even so, she pressed forward alone on a path where she couldn't see the end)

text_block_list.text: With no guiding policy, she just gathered as much information as she could and put in as much effort as possible. Running recklessly all by herself.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
…I didn't want to stop. Even if I was doing it wrong… 
I wanted to work hard.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Just like everyone else moving forward—I wanted to get closer to my goal too.
choice_data_list: <size=38>I know. That's why I'll light your path</size>
<size=38>I know. That's why I'll light your path</size>

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
choice_data_list: <size=34>That way, you won't have to be afraid anymore</size>

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: …So you figured it all out, huh.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
…Trainer, my body is weak. I have to take breaks sometimes. 
It's the kind of body that ends up getting "lapped."

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: But I don't want to give up on working hard. I don't want to stop. If you'll teach me the right way to put in effort, then I want to move forward with that.
choice_data_list: <size=30>『Yeah, and I'll be right by your side until the very end』</size>
<size=30>『Yeah, and I'll be right by your side until the very end』</size>

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Huh—!
…I have no intention of running away from that responsibility. From here on out, I'll be guiding a girl whose body is weak and whose racing life will likely be difficult, down a thorny path.
choice_data_list: <size=34>No matter what happens, I'll keep supporting you</size>
<size=34>No matter what happens, I'll keep supporting you</size>

text_block_list.text: —I'm prepared for that. As the one who showed her the path, I'll be with her to the very end. Even if we both step away from racing. I will be someone she can rely on.
choice_data_list: <size=32>Whenever you're in trouble, I will definitely help you</size>
<size=32>Whenever you're in trouble, I will definitely help you</size>

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: —…I have you.
choice_data_list: <size=32>『So go down the path you want to take! Tsuyoshi!!』</size>
<size=32>『So go down the path you want to take! Tsuyoshi!!』</size>

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
…—— Yes!! 
I'll do my absolute best!! So—!
choice_data_list: <size=38>『Let's keep going full speed ahead!!』</size>

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: 『So Trainer. I want to try training in the lazy river pool too. The strain on my body would be lighter!』
choice_data_list: <size=32>Oh, you've got quite a few plans yourself, Tsuyoshi</size>
<size=32>Oh, you've got quite a few plans yourself, Tsuyoshi</size>

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
『Yes! I have more time to think than the other girls! 
I've been thinking about a lot of other things too, and f… fuwaaa…—』

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: 『I-I'm sorry. Ehehe. For some reason, after talking about all this, I suddenly feel… Fufu…』

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: 『Umm, Twainer… I'll… do my beeeeshhh…—』
choice_data_list: <size=38>…? Tsuyoshi? Hellooo?</size>

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
…Trainer. 
Dear Tsuru is sleeping soundly～

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Very soundly indeed. 
I am sure today… she will not wake up until morning.
choice_data_list: <size=38>『…I see』</size>

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
W-Ah, ah!! Trainer!! Good morning!! 
I'm so sorry about today—
choice_data_list: <size=36>Ah, Tsuyoshi! Sounds like you overslept today!</size>
<size=36>Ah, Tsuyoshi! Sounds like you overslept today!</size>

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Fugya!? W-W-W-W-Why did you find out…!? 
Was it Bright!? Or maybe El and the others!?
choice_data_list: <size=30>Now now, more importantly, how are you feeling today?</size>

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Today…? 
…Let's see.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
My body feels the lightest it's been in days! 
If I run like this, I bet I'll get a great time.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: …So, Trainer. If I do incredibly well in today's training and show you a run that meets your expectations—

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Will you sign an official contract with me today? 
…With me, as your Trainee.
The schedule for the day was set. Heading to the track with Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi. She took her position, steadied her breathing, and sharpened her focus—
choice_data_list: <size=38>Go! Tsuyoshi!!</size>

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: —Yes!!

Seeing her run in person at last was truly wonderful. 
It was a run that truly met expectations.
—Right after she finished running, we signed a trainer contract, promising to 『aim for the Triple Crown』
